summary: Iteration 114: Starseed Adventure RPG feature fully tested. All 25 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed - character select with 6 origins, origin detail panel with lore, character name input, game scene with AI-generated narrative, 3 choices with stat effects, XP bar, stat bars, scene image area, and back button all working correctly. Games page has featured Starseed card. Dashboard has Starseed and Scriptures shortcuts.
seed_data_creation: Created test characters: TEST_Lyran_Warrior, TEST_Sirian_Guide, TEST_Arcturian_Architect during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Starseed Adventure RPG fully implemented and tested. 6 origins (pleiadian, sirian, arcturian, lyran, andromedan, orion) with unique stats, lore, and backgrounds. AI scene generation uses GPT-4o (5-15s), AI image generation uses GPT Image 1 (15-45s). Character progression includes XP, levels, stats (wisdom, courage, compassion, intuition, resilience), and achievements. Key data-testids: origin-{id}, continue-{origin_id}, character-select, origin-detail-panel, character-name-input, start-adventure-btn, game-scene, scene-narrative, choice-0/1/2, scene-image, xp-bar, stat-{stat}, scene-back-btn. Games page has game-card-starseed. Dashboard has dashboard-action-starseed and dashboard-action-scriptures.

backend_api.GET /api/starseed/origins: PASS - Returns 6 origins with all required fields (id, name, star_system, element, color, gradient, traits, description, lore)
backend_api.POST /api/starseed/create-character: PASS - Creates character with stats, returns full character object
backend_api.GET /api/starseed/character/{origin_id}: PASS - Returns specific character with stats, level, xp
backend_api.POST /api/starseed/generate-scene: PASS - Returns scene with narrative, scene_title, atmosphere, choices (3), image_prompt, xp_earned
backend_api.POST /api/starseed/generate-scene with c: PASS - Applies stat changes and advances story
backend_api.GET /api/starseed/backgrounds/{origin_id: PASS - Returns array of background URLs for all 6 origins
backend_api.POST /api/starseed/generate-scene-image: PASS - Returns image_base64 or fallback image_url
backend_api.authentication: PASS - Protected endpoints require auth, origins/backgrounds are public

frontend_ui.character_select_page: PASS - data-testid='character-select' loads with all 6 origins
frontend_ui.origin_detail_panel: PASS - data-testid='origin-detail-panel' shows lore when origin selected
frontend_ui.continue_adventure: PASS - data-testid='continue-pleiadian' etc. for existing characters
frontend_ui.game_scene: PASS - data-testid='game-scene' loads after starting/continuing adventure
frontend_ui.choices: PASS - data-testid='choice-0/1/2' all present with stat effects
frontend_ui.scene_image: PASS - data-testid='scene-image' shows loading spinner or generated image
frontend_ui.xp_bar: PASS - data-testid='xp-bar' shows level and XP progress
frontend_ui.back_button: PASS - data-testid='scene-back-btn' returns to character select

games_page.card_content: PASS - Shows RPG Adventure, AI-Powered badges, all 6 origin names

ai_integration_notes.scene_generation: GPT-4o via emergentintegrations.llm.chat - 5-15 seconds response time
ai_integration_notes.image_generation: GPT Image 1 via emergentintegrations.llm.openai.image_generation - 15-45 seconds, falls back to stock backgrounds on failure
